# Theia Design
This directory contains game design documents and resources which are developed in the [Theia-design](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git) repository, separate from the [main game repository](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia.git). 

**Do not edit these files directly in the [Theia game repo](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia.git), they will be overwritten from the [Theia-design repo](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git) as a subtree.**

## Subtree
Always pull the latest changes from [Theia-design](https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git) before referencing these docs in development.
```bash
git subtree pull --prefix=design https://github.com/dstoffels/Theia-design.git main --squash
```
